options.name: -area
options.description: Specifies the coordinates for the area from which to compress PG. Only special wires and special vias within the specified area will be compressed. Default: Compress all PG structure.

options.name: -incremental
options.description: This option can only be specified when the current design is in compressed mode. Call -incremental to re-compress the PG. You can use it after you edit PG wires or vias.

options.name: -layers
options.description: Specifies the layers on which to compress PG. You must use LEF layer names or a routing layer index value (1 for the first routing layer, 2 for the second routing layer, and so on). ((layer)+, optional)

options.name: -nets
options.description: Specifies the nets from which to compress PG. If the specified net doesn't have any special routes on it, the net will be ignored. ((net)+, optional)
